'''dopadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:coactivated|coactivated]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-p-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coactivated|coactivated]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dopadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopadhithi|dopadhithi]] || [[word:dopadhiji|dopadhiji]] || [[word:dopadhishi|dopadhishi]] || [[word:dopadhiki|dopadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopadhuthuthu|dopadhuthuthu]] || [[word:dopadhujuju|dopadhujuju]] || [[word:dopadhushushu|dopadhushushu]] || [[word:dopadhukuku|dopadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopadhuthu|dopadhuthu]] || [[word:dopadhuju|dopadhuju]] || [[word:dopadhushu|dopadhushu]] || [[word:dopadhuku|dopadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopadhufthuf|dopadhufthuf]] || [[word:dopadhufjuf|dopadhufjuf]] || [[word:dopadhufshuf|dopadhufshuf]] || [[word:dopadhufkuf|dopadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopadhethe|dopadhethe]] || [[word:dopadheje|dopadheje]] || [[word:dopadheshe|dopadheshe]] || [[word:dopadheke|dopadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopadhothotho|dopadhothotho]] || [[word:dopadhojojo|dopadhojojo]] || [[word:dopadhoshosho|dopadhoshosho]] || [[word:dopadhokoko|dopadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopadhotho|dopadhotho]] || [[word:dopadhojo|dopadhojo]] || [[word:dopadhosho|dopadhosho]] || [[word:dopadhoko|dopadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopadhofthof|dopadhofthof]] || [[word:dopadhofjof|dopadhofjof]] || [[word:dopadhofshof|dopadhofshof]] || [[word:dopadhofkof|dopadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopadhïfthïf|dopadhïfthïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfjïf|dopadhïfjïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfshïf|dopadhïfshïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfkïf|dopadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopadhïfthïfthïf|dopadhïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfjïfjïf|dopadhïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfshïfshïf|dopadhïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfkïfkïf|dopadhïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopadhïfthïf|dopadhïfthïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfjïf|dopadhïfjïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfshïf|dopadhïfshïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfkïf|dopadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopadhïfthïf|dopadhïfthïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfjïf|dopadhïfjïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfshïf|dopadhïfshïf]] || [[word:dopadhïfkïf|dopadhïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dopadhæthæ|dopadhæthæ]] || [[word:dopadhæjæ|dopadhæjæ]] || [[word:dopadhæshæ|dopadhæshæ]] || [[word:dopadhækæ|dopadhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dopadhathatha|dopadhathatha]] || [[word:dopadhajaja|dopadhajaja]] || [[word:dopadhashasha|dopadhashasha]] || [[word:dopadhakaka|dopadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dopadhatha|dopadhatha]] || [[word:dopadhaja|dopadhaja]] || [[word:dopadhasha|dopadhasha]] || [[word:dopadhaka|dopadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dopadhafthaf|dopadhafthaf]] || [[word:dopadhafjaf|dopadhafjaf]] || [[word:dopadhafshaf|dopadhafshaf]] || [[word:dopadhafkaf|dopadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dopadhasha|dopadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dopadhshësha|dopadhshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dopadhrosha|dopadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dopadhmusha|dopadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dopadhyasha|dopadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godopadhnkshësha|godopadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godopadhnkrosha|godopadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godopadhnkmusha|godopadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godopadhnkyasha|godopadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dopapadhasha|dopapadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dopapadhshësha|dopapadhshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dopapadhrosha|dopapadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dopapadhmusha|dopapadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dopapadhyasha|dopapadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godopapadhnkshësha|godopapadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godopapadhnkrosha|godopapadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godopapadhnkmusha|godopapadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godopapadhnkyasha|godopapadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:depædhasha|depædhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:depædhshësha|depædhshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:depædhrosha|depædhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:depædhmusha|depædhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:depædhyasha|depædhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godepædhnkshësha|godepædhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godepædhnkrosha|godepædhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godepædhnkmusha|godepædhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godepædhnkyasha|godepædhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dopfadhasha|dopfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dopfadhshësha|dopfadhshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dopfadhrosha|dopfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dopfadhmusha|dopfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dopfadhyasha|dopfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godopfadhnkshësha|godopfadhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godopfadhnkrosha|godopfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godopfadhnkmusha|godopfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godopfadhnkyasha|godopfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
